hero.name: Jumaqulov Yashnar
hero.description: I craft modern web experiences with clean code and creative design. Passionate about turning ideas into pixel-perfect realities.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A little bit about who I am and what drives me as a developer
about.bio: I'm Jumaqulov Yashnar, a junior frontend developer based in Uzbekistan. I started my journey with HTML and CSS, then moved on to JavaScript. Now I work with React and I'm getting better at it every day. I believe great UI is not just about looks — it's about how it feels to use. My future goal is to work at Microsoft.
